rationale: The proposed homestead exemption increase underTax Code §11.13(b) is unrelated to Educ. Code §37.021, which governs student course completion during in-school suspension placements. No overlap exists.
quote: Sec. 37.021. OPPORTUNITY TO COMPLETE COURSES DURING IN-SCHOOL AND CERTAIN OTHER PLACEMENTS.
_note: Rule text addresses education disciplinary placements; proposed change concerns property tax homestead exemption. No conflict.
